name: wxcode/admin-sprout-iot
title: Sprout IoT Admin
description: Dark-mode IoT device-fleet and telemetry console — left rail nav, gateway/site switcher, 4 KPI cards (online/offline/signal/alerts), multi-series sparkline telemetry panel, active alerts list, and a devices table with signal bars and firmware status.

query.en: Build me a dark IoT admin console for a device fleet — left nav rail, site/gateway switcher, 4 KPI cards showing online/offline counts, average signal strength, and open alerts, a telemetry sparkline panel for temperature/humidity/power, an active alerts list with severity pills, and a devices table with firmware version and signal bars.
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：Build me a dark IoT admin console for a device fleet — left nav rail, site/gateway switcher, 4 KPI cards showing online/offline counts, average signal strength, and open alerts, a telemetry sparkline panel for temperature/humidity/power, an active alerts list with severity pills, and a devices table with firmware version and signal bars.

provenance.note: category design-language reference only; original implementation
